# kolinn.dev

> Personal portfolio of kolinn - DevOps, SecOps, Cloud & Full Stack Engineer based in Myanmar with 4 years of experience building lean, clean architectural solutions.

## Core Competencies
- **DevOps & Infrastructure**: CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, cloud-native infrastructure at scale.
- **Security Operations (SecOps)**: Security-first architectures, vulnerability assessments, compliance-driven development.
- **Cloud Architecture**: Multi-cloud deployments, serverless patterns, high availability.
- **Software Engineering**: Clean architecture, Full Stack Development, API Design, TDD/BDD.
- **UI/UX Design**: Human-centered interfaces, accessible interactions, pixel-perfect implementations.
- **Automation**: Workflow automation, AI orchestration, n8n, reducing toil.

## Tech Stack
- **Languages**: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, Go, Dart, Kotlin, C++, CSS
- **Frameworks**: React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Django, FastAPI, Flutter, WordPress
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, ChromaDB
- **Tools**: Docker, Proxmox, Ceph, Grafana, PyTorch, n8n

## Featured Projects
- **E-Commerce Platform**: Full-stack app with real-time inventory and Stripe integration. (React.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL)
- **AI Chatbot**: Firebase-powered Flutter chatbot with multi-model AI support. (Flutter, Firebase, Gemini API)
- **Proxmox HA Cluster**: Data center-grade homelab with high-availability clustering. (Proxmox, Ceph, Linux)
- **LLM Fine-tuning & RAG**: Custom LLM pipeline with domain-specific RAG implementation. (PyTorch, Python, FastAPI)
- **AI Customer Service**: AI-orchestrated platform using n8n workflows. (n8n, Node.js, OpenAI)
